description: Ultra-glam and ultra stylish shoes from catwalk for the urban woman. Hit the party circuit armed with these uber-slick shoes and take on the dance floor! Heel: 5" Upper Elasticated criss-crossing straps with a heel cup at the heel collar Crystal encrusted tail at the crux of the straps Curved footbed with a heel patch Outsole TPR outsole with textured grooves on the heel cap and forefoot shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
